name: electroCore, Inc.
business: electroCore is a bioelectronic technology company whose mission is to improve health and quality of life through innovative non-invasive bioelectronic technologies. Our two leading commercial products are gammaCore non-invasive vagus nerve stimulation, or nVNS, and Quell Fibromyalgia, or Quell. We also sell our Truvaga and TAC-STIM products, which are handheld, personal-use consumer products, developed to promote general wellness and human performance.
namedCustomers: United States Department of Veterans Affairs

exposures.sentence: Our two leading commercial products are gammaCore non-invasive vagus nerve stimulation, or nVNS, and Quell Fibromyalgia, or Quell.
We sell our general wellness products direct-to-consumer through our ecommerce site, www.truvaga.com, and through select Truvaga retail and marketplace partners, including Best Buy and Rehabmart.
We sell the TAC-STIM handset for human performance as a COtS solution to active duty military and professional organizations.
We recently acquired the Quell platform as part of the merger with NURO which comes with a companion application.

During the years ended December 31, 2025 and 2024, revenue from VA facilities pursuant to the terms and conditions of our qualifying contract under the FSS and open market sales represented 71.2% and 70.6% of our total revenue, respectively.

catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we launched our next generation prescription gammaCore device under the brand gammaCore Emerald.

catalysts.event: Relaunch of Quell OTC in direct-to-consumer channel
catalysts.sentence: We intend to expand our prescription device business through internal and external sales representatives and relaunch the over-the-counter Quell OTC product in the direct-to-consumer business channel in 2026.
In 2026, we expect NICE to review the guidance document, and any changes in recommendation or pricing may adversely impact our ability to work with NHS England on the MTFM program.
